titles.title: Peace in the Midst of the Storm

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Even though the winds aren't still And the waves continue tossing me From the storm I call His name For relief from things distressing me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now so quietly it comes Strength to find my course again Though He does so much for me His sweetest gift will always be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Peace in the midst of the storm Peace in the midst of the storm I cry to Him for mercy And His great love takes the form Of peace in the midst of the storm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What tomorrows hold, will they hold Joy and sadness coming day by day But I will not be afraid Though I know some storms Will come my way

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let my enemy be sure I will not be lost at sea There will never come a time That with prayer l cannot find
